levels.title: Place Value to 10,000
levels.goal: Understand thousands/hundreds/tens/ones, represent numbers in multiple ways, and round sensibly.
skills: Use number lines for magnitude and rounding

activities.title: Count to 10,000 Trail
activities.description: Fill in missing numbers as you climb to 10,000.

activities.title: Place Value Builder (to 10,000)
activities.description: Build the number using thousands, hundreds, tens, and ones.

activities.title: Expanded Form Match (to 10,000)
activities.description: Match the number to its expanded form.

activities.title: Compare 4-Digit Numbers
activities.description: Pick >, <, or = to compare.

activities.title: Order the Numbers (to 10,000)
activities.description: Put numbers in order from least to greatest.

activities.title: Number Line to 10,000
activities.description: Find where the number belongs on the number line.

activities.title: Round to the Nearest 10/100/1000
activities.description: Round numbers to the nearest 10, 100, or 1,000.

activities.title: Digit Value Detective
activities.description: What value does this digit represent?

levels.title: Add/Subtract Within 1,000
levels.goal: Add and subtract within 1,000 using place-value reasoning, regrouping, and estimation.
skills: Solve one- and two-step word problems

activities.title: Add Within 1,000 (Base-Ten)
activities.description: Use blocks to add three-digit numbers.

activities.title: Subtract Within 1,000 (Base-Ten)
activities.description: Trade and take away to subtract.

activities.title: Regrouping Practice: Add (Column)
activities.description: Practice adding with regrouping.

activities.title: Regrouping Practice: Subtract (Column)
activities.description: Practice subtracting with regrouping.

activities.title: Estimate, Then Check
activities.description: Estimate first, then solve exactly.

activities.title: Number Line Add/Subtract (to 1,000)
activities.description: Jump by hundreds, tens, and ones.

activities.title: Missing Number (to 1,000)
activities.description: Find the mystery number in an equation.

activities.title: Two-Step Word Problems
activities.description: Solve a short story in two steps.

levels.title: Multiply & Divide Within 100
levels.goal: Understand multiplication and division as equal groups and arrays, and build fluent strategies.
skills: Interpret multiplication as equal groups / arrays
Use skip counting patterns connected to facts

activities.title: Build an Array
activities.description: Make an array with the given rows and columns.

activities.title: Multiply the Array
activities.description: Find the total using rows x columns.

activities.title: Equal Groups Stories
activities.description: Use equal groups to solve story problems.

activities.title: Missing Factor Puzzle
activities.description: Find the missing number in a multiplication fact.

activities.title: Fact Family Match (× and ÷)
activities.description: Multiplication and division are a family.

activities.title: Division Sharing Game
activities.description: Share items equally and see how many in each group.

activities.title: Skip Count for Multiplication
activities.description: Use skip counting to find products.

activities.title: Match Picture to Equation
activities.description: Which equation matches the picture?

levels.title: Fractions as Numbers
levels.goal: Understand fractions as equal parts of a whole and as numbers on the number line, including equivalence and comparisons.
skills: Understand 1/b and a/b as equal parts
Place fractions on a number line

activities.title: Fraction of a Shape
activities.description: What fraction is shaded?

activities.title: Build the Fraction
activities.description: Shade or select parts to make the fraction.

activities.title: Fractions on the Number Line
activities.description: Place the fraction between 0 and 1.

activities.title: Equivalent Fractions Match
activities.description: Find fractions that name the same amount.

activities.title: Compare Fractions
activities.description: Use >, <, or = to compare fractions.

activities.title: Fraction Story Problems
activities.description: Read a short story and solve with fractions.

activities.title: Fractions Equal to 1
activities.description: Which fractions make a whole?

activities.title: Count Unit Fractions
activities.description: How many 1/b pieces are shown?

levels.title: Measurement & Geometry
levels.goal: Measure and reason about area and perimeter, read time problems, interpret scaled graphs, and classify quadrilaterals.
skills: Find perimeter by counting and by adding side lengths
Understand area as counting square units and as rows x columns
Compare mass and volume with appropriate units

activities.title: Perimeter Walk
activities.description: Find the perimeter by walking around the edge.

activities.title: Build the Perimeter
activities.description: Add side lengths to find perimeter.

activities.title: Area Count (Square Units)
activities.description: Count squares to find area.

activities.title: Area as Multiply
activities.description: Use rows x columns to find area fast.

activities.title: Elapsed Time Stories
activities.description: How much time passed?

activities.title: Mass & Volume Compare
activities.description: Choose the best unit and compare amounts.

activities.title: Scaled Bar Graph Questions
activities.description: Read a bar graph where each mark counts more than 1.

activities.title: Quadrilateral Sort
activities.description: Sort quadrilaterals by their properties.
